sections.heading: Who We Are
sections.body: Treviqo Traders (OPC) Pvt Ltd is a Noida-based fashion and apparel company committed to bringing quality garments and lifestyle products to customers across India. Operating under the brand name Treviqo, we offer a curated selection of clothing for men, women, kids, ethnic wear, and sportswear at competitive prices.

sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.body: We believe everyone deserves access to stylish, affordable fashion. Our mission is to make online garment shopping simple, trustworthy, and enjoyable — from everyday essentials like socks and innerwear to festive ethnic collections and activewear.

sections.heading: Registered Office
sections.body: Unit no 527, P5/B Block, NPX Tower, Sec-153, Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, UP 201301, India.

sections.heading: Contact Person
sections.body: Neeraj Kumar — reachable at +91 8796065003 or support@treviqo.co.in.

Welcome to Treviqo (operated by Treviqo Traders (OPC) Pvt Ltd). By accessing or using our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before placing an order.

sections.heading: 1. General
sections.body: These terms govern your use of the Treviqo website and the purchase of products listed on it. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

sections.heading: 2. Products & Pricing
sections.body: All product descriptions, images, and prices are subject to change without notice. We strive for accuracy but do not warrant that descriptions or prices are error-free. In case of a pricing error, we reserve the right to cancel the order and issue a full refund.

sections.heading: 3. Orders & Payment
sections.body: Placing an order constitutes an offer to purchase. We reserve the right to accept or reject any order. Payment must be completed at checkout. All prices are in Indian Rupees (INR) and inclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.

sections.heading: 4. Shipping & Delivery
sections.body: We deliver across India. Delivery timelines vary by location and are estimates only. Free delivery is available on orders above ₹499. Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery to the carrier.

sections.heading: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website — including logos, text, images, and design — is the property of Treviqo Traders (OPC) Pvt Ltd and may not be reproduced without written permission.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Treviqo Traders (OPC) Pvt Ltd shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the website or products purchased through it.

sections.heading: 7. Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.body: For questions regarding these terms, contact Neeraj Kumar at +91 8796065003 or support@treviqo.co.in. Registered office: Unit no 527, P5/B Block, NPX Tower, Sec-153, Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, UP 201301.

Treviqo Traders (OPC) Pvt Ltd ("we", "us", "Treviqo") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you use our website.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, phone number, shipping address, and payment details. We also collect browsing data such as IP address, browser type, and pages visited through cookies and analytics tools.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: Your information is used to process orders, communicate about your purchases, improve our website and product offerings, send promotional communications (with your consent), and comply with legal obligations.

sections.heading: Sharing of Information
sections.body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with trusted third parties who assist in operating our website, processing payments, and delivering orders. These parties are bound by confidentiality agreements.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.body: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at support@treviqo.co.in. You may opt out of marketing communications at any time.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, remember your preferences, and analyse site traffic. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, though some features may not function properly.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For privacy-related queries, contact Neeraj Kumar at +91 8796065003 or support@treviqo.co.in. Treviqo Traders (OPC) Pvt Ltd, Unit no 527, P5/B Block, NPX Tower, Sec-153, Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, UP 201301.
At Treviqo, customer satisfaction is our priority. If you are not happy with your purchase, we offer a straightforward refund process as outlined below.

sections.heading: Eligibility for Refund
sections.body: Refunds are available for products returned within 7 days of delivery, provided the item is unused, unwashed, and in its original packaging with all tags attached. Innerwear, socks (opened packs), and customized items are non-refundable unless defective.

sections.heading: Defective or Wrong Items
sections.body: If you receive a defective, damaged, or incorrect product, contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos. We will arrange a free pickup and issue a full refund or replacement at your choice.

sections.heading: Refund Process
sections.body: Once we receive and inspect the returned item, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days to the original payment method. Bank processing times may add 3–5 additional business days.

sections.heading: Partial Refunds
sections.body: Partial refunds may be issued for items not in their original condition, missing tags, or showing signs of use.

sections.heading: How to Initiate a Refund
sections.body: Email support@treviqo.co.in or call +91 8796065003 with your order number and reason for return. Our team will guide you through the return process.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: Neeraj Kumar, Treviqo Traders (OPC) Pvt Ltd, Unit no 527, P5/B Block, NPX Tower, Sec-153, Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, UP 201301.
We understand that plans change. Below is our policy for order cancellations at Treviqo.

sections.heading: Before Dispatch
sections.body: You may cancel your order free of charge before it has been dispatched. To cancel, contact us at +91 8796065003 or support@treviqo.co.in with your order number. A full refund will be processed within 3–5 business days.

sections.heading: After Dispatch
sections.body: Once an order has been shipped, cancellation is not possible. You may refuse delivery or initiate a return under our Refund Policy after receiving the product.

sections.heading: Cancellation by Treviqo
sections.body: We reserve the right to cancel orders due to stock unavailability, pricing errors, or suspected fraudulent activity. In such cases, a full refund will be issued promptly and you will be notified by email or phone.

sections.heading: How to Cancel
sections.body: Contact Neeraj Kumar at +91 8796065003 (Mon–Sat, 10 AM – 6 PM) or email support@treviqo.co.in with your order ID. Cancellations requested after dispatch will be treated as returns.

sections.heading: Refund Timeline
sections.body: Cancelled order refunds are credited within 3–7 business days depending on your bank or payment provider.
